description: Create an Earned Value Management (EVM) dashboard for a construction project using the data in /home/ga/Documents/project_evm_data.xlsx. The dashboard must be located on a new sheet named 'EVM_Dashboard' and include project-level metrics for BAC, PV, EV, AC, SV, CV, SPI, CPI, EAC, ETC, VAC, and TCPI calculated from the 8 months of data in the 'Project_Budget' and 'Project_Actuals' sheets. Additionally, include a cumulative S-curve line chart comparing Planned Value, Earned Value, and Actual Cost over the 8-month period. Save the completed dashboard to /home/ga/Documents/project_evm_data.xlsx.
